{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Tyrakki Desert
| introduced = cradle-13-threshold
}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|The [[Tyrakki Desert]] is a location where survival tactics include camouflage and hypnotic auras.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c11">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 11</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
